'''Allynic E'Kles''' was a [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] from [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] who served as a [[Jedi investigator/Legends|Jedi investigator]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. His knowledge was stored in [[Allynic E'Kles's holocron|his holocron]], including many of his [[Memnis|memnii]], which could be accessed by [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="POTJ" />

{{Char-stub}}
